title: Community Meetup
description: Join us for a friendly gathering and some fun activities.

title: Workshop: Build Your Website
description: A hands-on workshop for beginners in web development.

title: Cannabis Education & Wellness Fair
description: Learn about cannabis wellness, meet local dispensaries, and enjoy educational talks from industry experts.

title: 420 Friendly Art & Music Night
description: An evening of local art, live music, and cannabis-friendly socializing. Bring your own or enjoy what's available on-site.

title: Meditation & Cannabis Mindfulness Session
description: Join us for a guided meditation session in a cannabis-friendly environment. Focus on mindfulness and relaxation.
